frameworks.name: HIPAA
frameworks.description: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act

requirements.title: Access Control
requirements.description: Implement technical policies to allow access only to authorized persons. Requires forbidden_path guard with patterns covering sensitive directories.

requirements.title: Audit Controls
requirements.description: Implement hardware, software, and procedural mechanisms for recording and examining access. Requires verbose logging enabled.

requirements.title: Integrity Controls
requirements.description: Protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction. Requires patch_integrity guard enabled.

requirements.title: Transmission Security
requirements.description: Guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over networks. Requires egress_allowlist with default_action: block.

requirements.title: PHI Data Protection
requirements.description: Prevent leakage of protected health information. Requires secret_leak guard with medical/PHI-related patterns.

requirements.title: Authentication
requirements.description: Verify entity identity before granting access. Requires mcp_tool guard with restricted default action.

requirements.title: Emergency Access
requirements.description: Establish procedures for obtaining ePHI during emergencies. Requires a reasonable session timeout configured.

requirements.title: Automatic Logoff
requirements.description: Implement electronic procedures that terminate sessions after inactivity. Requires session_timeout_secs <= 3600.

requirements.title: Encryption
requirements.description: Implement mechanisms to encrypt and decrypt ePHI. Requires secret_leak guard with key/credential patterns.

requirements.title: Command Restriction
requirements.description: Restrict dangerous shell commands that could compromise systems containing ePHI. Requires shell_command guard enabled.

requirements.title: Logical Access Controls
requirements.description: Restrict logical access to information assets. Requires forbidden_path and mcp_tool guards.

requirements.title: Access Provisioning
requirements.description: New access is provisioned based on authorization. Requires path_allowlist or forbidden_path guard.

requirements.title: Access Removal
requirements.description: Access is removed when no longer needed. Requires session_timeout_secs configured.

requirements.title: System Boundaries
requirements.description: Restrict data transmission across system boundaries. Requires egress_allowlist guard.

requirements.title: Data Transmission Security
requirements.description: Restrict data transmission to authorized channels. Requires egress_allowlist with default_action: block.

requirements.title: Detection Monitoring
requirements.description: Detection procedures are in place for anomalies. Requires prompt_injection or jailbreak guard.

requirements.title: Incident Detection
requirements.description: Anomalies are monitored and incidents identified. Requires secret_leak guard enabled.

requirements.title: Change Management
requirements.description: Changes to infrastructure and software are authorized. Requires patch_integrity guard enabled.

frameworks.name: PCI-DSS
frameworks.description: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard

requirements.title: Network Security
requirements.description: Install and maintain network security controls. Requires egress_allowlist guard enabled.

requirements.title: Secure Defaults
requirements.description: Apply secure configurations to all system components. Requires extending strict ruleset or equivalent guard coverage.

requirements.title: Protect Stored Data
requirements.description: Protect stored account data. Requires secret_leak guard with card number patterns.

requirements.title: Secure Development
requirements.description: Develop and maintain secure systems. Requires patch_integrity and shell_command guards.

requirements.title: Restrict Access
requirements.description: Restrict access by business need-to-know. Requires forbidden_path and mcp_tool with block default.

requirements.title: Authentication
requirements.description: Identify users and authenticate access. Requires session_timeout_secs <= 1800 (30 minutes).

requirements.title: Logging & Monitoring
requirements.description: Log and monitor all access to system components and cardholder data. Requires verbose_logging enabled.
